text.title: SSR Style Extraction
text.summary: styled-components and Emotion require server-side style collection to prevent FOUC. Write a Playwright assertion that confirms style tags appear in the initial HTML.

rule.statement: For Next.js App Router with styled-components, wrap the tree in a ServerStyleSheet registry component with "use client" and compiler.styledComponents enabled in next.config.js.
rule.rationale: styled-components v6 without the registry produces hydration mismatches because CSS is injected client-side after the server-rendered HTML is painted.

rule.statement: Write a Playwright test that fetches the page HTML and asserts a style tag with data-styled or equivalent attribute is present in the initial response body.
rule.rationale: FOUC is only visible on slow networks; it cannot be caught in development but fails user perception on first paint in production.
